'''manïfshïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nymphing|nymphing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nymphing|nymphing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| manïfshïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || mænïfshïfth || mænïfshïfj || mænïfshïfsh || mænïfshïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || manïfnïfshïfth || manïfnïfshïfj || manïfnïfshïfsh || manïfnïfshïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || manïfshïfth || manïfshïfj || manïfshïfsh || manïfshïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || manïffshïffth || manïffshïffj || manïffshïffsh || manïffshïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || manïfshïfïf || manïfshïfïf || manïfshïfïf || manïfshïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || manïfshïfth || manïfshïfj || manïfshïfsh || manïfshïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || manïfshïfïfl || manïfshïfïfl || manïfshïfïfl || manïfshïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || manïfshïfïfïf || manïfshïfïfïf || manïfshïfïfïf || manïfshïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || manïfshïfïfn || manïfshïfïfn || manïfshïfïfn || manïfshïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || manïfshïfïforo || manïfshïfïforo || manïfshïfïforo || manïfshïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
